text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am Symboli Rudolf. I look forward to working
hand in glove with you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...My goal is to establish a world in which every
single Umamusume lives in bliss. To this end, I
must produce results befitting the Emperor who
would guide them all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let us walk this hallowed, imperial path together,
gathering the prestigious crowns that mark it as
we make for its ultimate destination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
